arguments.name: Ping near.ai every 5 minutes
arguments.prompt: Ping https://near.ai and check if it returns an HTTP 200 status. Make an HTTP GET request to https://near.ai. If the response status is 200, report back "✅ near.ai is UP (HTTP 200)". If the status is anything else or the request fails, report back "❌ near.ai is DOWN — status: <actual status or error>".

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Ping near.ai every 5 minutes |

| **Task** | HTTP GET `https://near.ai` → report 200 (UP) or other/error (DOWN) |
| **Delivery** | Slack DM |
| **Next run** | 2026-07-21T14:10:00 UTC |
